channel.title: Alex Blania: Complete Comprehensive Case Study
channel.description: Complete comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as the repeat co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. Full 24+ minute analysis covering the entire PDF content.
channel.itunes:author: Amanda Bradford
channel.itunes:summary: Complete comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as the repeat co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. Full 24+ minute analysis covering the entire PDF content.

item.title: Alex Blania and the Human Layer of the Internet - Complete Comprehensive Case Study
item.description: Complete comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as the repeat co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. This full 24+ minute analysis covers the entire PDF content including strategic options, token economics, interview insights, decision frameworks, 180-day execution plan, exhibits, and teaching notes.
item.itunes:summary: Complete comprehensive business case study examining Alex Blania's strategic challenge as the repeat co-founder of multiple AI-era companies. Full analysis covering strategic options, token economics, interview insights, hiring recommendations, decision frameworks, 180-day execution plan, exhibits, teaching notes, and complete source materials.
